data.description_suggestion: Uploads a file attachment to the Veem system. Accepts file uploads in multipart/form-data format. data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. data.description_suggestion: Creates and initiates a new payment transaction. Requires payment details including recipient, amount, currency, and payment method. data.summary_suggestion: Register a new webhook event subscription
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications. Requires a valid endpoint URL and specification of event types to subscribe to (e.g., payment.completed, payment.failed). The webhook will immediately begin receiving POST requests for matching events. Returns the created Webhook object with a unique subscription ID and status. Veem will validate endpoint accessibility before activation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (URL, event types), explains the side effect (immediate activation), describes the response, and mentions validation behavior. This helps AI agents understand prerequisites and what happens after creation.

data.summary_suggestion: Modify webhook subscription settings
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing webhook subscription configuration. Supports partial updates to endpoint URL, event types, and subscription status (enable/disable). Requires the webhook subscription ID. Returns the updated Webhook object reflecting all changes. Changes take effect immediately for new events. Existing queued events are not affected by configuration changes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what can be updated, whether updates are partial or full, what the return value contains, and when changes take effect. message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the side effects or irreversibility. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent, what happens to pending events, and that recreation is required to resume notifications. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Remove a webhook subscription permanently
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a webhook subscription from the account. Requires the webhook subscription ID. Once deleted, the webhook endpoint will no longer receive event notifications. Any pending events queued for delivery are discarded. This action cannot be undone; to resume receiving events, a new webhook subscription must be created.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the side effects or irreversibility. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent, what happens to pending events, and that recreation is required to resume notifications. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current exchange rate for currency pair
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current exchange rate for a specified currency pair. Requires source and target currency codes (ISO 4217 format, e.g., USD, EUR). Returns the current exchange rate, rate timestamp, and any applicable fees or markups. Rates are updated in real-time and reflect Veem's current pricing. Useful for calculating payment amounts in different currencies before initiating a payment.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies required input format (currency codes), explains what data is returned (rate, timestamp, fees), clarifies that rates are real-time, and provides context about when to use this operation. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and how to call it correctly.

data.summary_suggestion: Register a new webhook event subscription
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications. Requires a valid endpoint URL and specification of event types to subscribe to (e.g., payment.completed, payment.failed). The webhook will immediately begin receiving POST requests for matching events. Returns the created Webhook object with a unique subscription ID and status. Veem will validate endpoint accessibility before activation.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. data.summary_suggestion: Remove a webhook subscription permanently
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a webhook subscription from the account. Requires the webhook subscription ID. Once deleted, the webhook endpoint will no longer receive event notifications. Any pending events queued for delivery are discarded. This action cannot be undone; to resume receiving events, a new webhook subscription must be created.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the side effects or irreversibility. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent, what happens to pending events, and that recreation is required to resume notifications. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current exchange rate for currency pair
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current exchange rate for a specified currency pair. Requires source and target currency codes (ISO 4217 format, e.g., USD, EUR). Returns the current exchange rate, rate timestamp, and any applicable fees or markups. Rates are updated in real-time and reflect Veem's current pricing. Useful for calculating payment amounts in different currencies before initiating transfers.

Enhanced version specifies required input format (currency codes), explains what data is returned (rate, timestamp, fees), clarifies that rates are real-time, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation (pre-payment calculations).
